name: my-dealer-crm
description: My Dealer CRM (海さん専用) — 営業フォロー漏れ防止・点検/車検自動生成・端末間同期

scripts.build: npm run build -w @crm/shared && npm run build -w @crm/api && npm run build -w @crm/web
scripts.dev: concurrently -n api,web -c blue,green "npm run dev -w @crm/api" "npm run dev -w @crm/web"
scripts.test: npm run test -w @crm/shared && npm run test -w @crm/api
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w @crm/shared && npm run typecheck -w @crm/api && npm run typecheck -w @crm/web
